lyrics:
\#Intro
I am what stands in the dark and waits
\#Verse
You knew me as a child
The thing you feared at night
I was patient with your silence
No promise to recite
I watched through every turning
Not judging, not involved
You called it indecision
No riddle, never solved
\#Chorus
Crimson decision already made
To walk the path you can't evade
Each moment stayed
The act delayed
It's always now
It's when, not how
No debt repaid
Become what you vowed
To be
\#Verse
You feared I'd break the vessel
Unmake the life you knew
That choosing me would hollow
What little light shone through
So you lived inside the maybe
Where safety wears a crown
But truth is never gentle
When you can stop spinning 'round
\#Chorus
Crimson decision already made
To walk the path you can't evade
Each moment stayed
The act delayed
It's always now
It's when, not how
No debt repaid
Become what you vowed
To be
\#Verse
You stepped into the silence
Where you hoped you could remain
No longer seeking mercy
No longer needing blame
You wore me like a shadow
Then saw I was your skin
I was never near or far-
I was always held within
\#Chorus
Crimson decision already made
To walk the path you can't evade
Each moment stayed
The act delayed
It's always now
It's when, not how
No debt repaid
Become what you vowed
To be
\#Outro
I will remain
I will remind
I was always yours
persona:
## 4Castle

The Future of Rock, The Power of Harmony

**4Castle **is a genre-defying, five-piece supergroup under Maricopa Records, built on a foundation of powerful vocal harmonies, intricate musicianship, and fearless innovation. Rooted in rock, but unbound by limitations, their music fuses elements of progressive rock, funk, Latin rhythms, blues, and folk, delivering a sound that is both technically complex and emotionally resonant.

### **A Band Like No Other**

Each member of **4Castle **brings a distinct voice-both musically and vocally-to the mix:
🎸 **Raven Cortez**(Lead Guitar, Vocals) – A fiery virtuoso with Latin and blues influences, weaving face-melting solos into every performance.
🎸 **Skylar “Sky” Monroe**(Rhythm Guitar, Vocals) – The poetic soul of the band, crafting melodic foundations and lyrically rich storytelling.
🎹 **Jonah Vega**(Keyboards, Vocals) – The sonic architect, layering psychedelic synths, Hammond organ swells, and cinematic orchestrations.
🎸 **Malcolm “Mack” Bishop**(Bass, Vocals) – The groove master, blending funk, jazz, and progressive rock into fluid, deep-pocket basslines.
🥁 **Eli “Fox” Foster **(Drums, Vocals) – The wild heartbeat, pushing the band forward with thunderous fills, polyrhythmic grooves, and explosive energy.

### **What Defines 4Castle?**

- **Multi-Layered Vocal Harmonies**– All five members **sing**, creating **rich, choral-like textures**that elevate every song.

- **Complex Arrangements & Bold Songwriting**– Each track is an **immersive journey**, balancing **technical mastery with raw emotion**.

- **Rhythmic Power & Innovation**– From **tight funk grooves to shifting time signatures**, their music **moves you-literally and figuratively**.

- **Lyrically Challenging Yet Accessible**– Their songs explore **deep themes of life, change, and resilience**, wrapped in **memorable hooks and melodies**.

### **4Castle’s Sound**

Imagine putting Emerson, Lake & Palmer, Heart, Led Zeppelin, Sly Stone, and Carlos Santana in a blender. The result? **4Castle**. Their music pays homage to the greats while pushing rock’s boundaries into the future.

### **Join the Journey**

With Maricopa Records, **4Castle **is set to redefine what a modern rock band can be. Expect genre-bending albums, electrifying performances, and music that resonates across generations.

🚀 Follow **4Castle **as they build their legacy-one song, one harmony, and one unforgettable moment at a time.

[](https://open.spotify.com/artist/4Cmxf7xuTHzf7UahMK2xJh)[](https://music.apple.com/us/artist/4castle/1801052673)![](https://www.maricoparecords.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/5-rooks-in-a-dark-setting-1.png)
## Releases

impression.text: This modern rock track creates an atmosphere of introspective determination, balancing a dense texture of layered guitars with a clear, earnest vocal performance. The energy is highly dynamic, building from driving, palm-muted verses into powerful, anthemic choruses with a propulsive and solid feel. The production is polished and spacious, allowing each element to occupy its own space in a wide stereo field without feeling cluttered, while the rhythm section provides a punchy, centered foundation. A defining characteristic is the powerful dynamic lift into the chorus at 01:11, where the arrangement swells and the vocal delivery intensifies, creating a moment of significant emotional release.

review.review_text: Running at a brisk 136 BPM in a waltz-time signature, 'Crimson Decision' earns its momentum the hard way: a coiled, palm-muted verse that holds its breath until the chorus breaks open like a door kicked off its hinges. The lyric 'I was never near or far, I was always held within' lands the song's central idea cleanly, the kind of line that sounds inevitable once you've heard it. That lift at the first chorus, where the arrangement swells and the vocal stakes double, is the kind of dynamic payoff that reminds you why big rock production still matters. A highlight.
anchors_used: lyric: 'I was never near or far, I was always held within'
